items.headline: Former Afghanistan quick Shapoor Zadran battles for his life in Delhi hospital
items.description: Shapoor Zadran is suffering from Hemophagocytic Lymphohistiocytosis (HLH), a rare, life-threatening disease, in which the immune system starts failing
